query: SELECT item_id, name, category FROM game_item_catalog WHERE name REGEXP '^[a-zA-Z]' OR name REGEXP '[a-zA-Z]{3,}' ORDER BY category, item_id LIMIT 50;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT item_id, name, category FROM game_item_catalog WHERE name REGEXP '^[a-zA-Z]' OR name REGEXP '[a-zA-Z]{3,}' ORDER BY category, item_id LIMIT 50;
